response:
Write a cover letter for this job offer, explaining why I am a good fit for this position: Customer Support Manager at a major aerospace systems company. The role is based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, and is a permanent, full-time contract requiring a Master's degree and more than 5 years of experience. The position requires fluent English proficiency.

**Job Description**
As Customer Support Manager, you will serve as the company's representative, maintaining a privileged relationship with customers. When a customer needs resolution to an issue or question, they should know that the Customer Support Manager (CSM) can be relied upon for assistance. You will be in charge of a portfolio of customers in the Middle East region and will report to the Customer Support Director.

The CSM's responsibilities are broken down into three missions:
*   **Be the voice of the customer:** Build strong relationships; share customer difficulties and expectations within the organization and act as the escalation point when normal flow does not satisfy; escalate issues to the appropriate level.
*   **Manage customer contracts:** Act as the focal point for contract questions; ensure that support requirements are fulfilled; manage contract application including performance claims; support cash collection efforts as needed; ensure the required reporting and KPIs are met.
*   **Be accountable for customer satisfaction:** Act as a facilitator, coordinator, and point of escalation in the resolution of issues, ensuring proper follow-up with customers; monitor company performance and identify contributors to low performance; contribute to the development of improvement plans in coordination with the concerned responsible parties to improve customer satisfaction and yield positive results on Airframer Ratings; manage and coordinate dedicated improvement plans in collaboration with Business Lines, Sales, and Airframer Program Managers; organize regular reviews with customers and provide adequate reporting (spares delivery, repair shop processing time, in-service reliabilities, feedback on current issues, upcoming retrofits, technical action status, etc.).

**Job Requirements**
*   **Knowledge:**
    *   Diploma: Engineer or equivalent.
    *   Experience: 5 years in the aeronautical industry.
    *   General knowledge of aeronautical standards and regulations.
    *   General knowledge of contracts.
    *   Proficiency with ERP and Microsoft Office tools.
*   **Skills:**
    *   Fluent English.
    *   Team player with strong presentation, communication, analytical, negotiation, and problem-solving skills.
    *   Self-motivated and able to work independently.
    *
